title: PSM SOP Management Record
description: Evidence model for PSM Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) records per OSHA-KR Article 44.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for the SOP record

sop_id.description: ID of the standard operating procedure

change_summary.description: Summary of changes in this SOP revision

worker_id.description: ID of the worker acknowledging the SOP

signature_date.description: Date the worker signed the SOP acknowledgment

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the record was created

agent_id.description: ID of the agent that generated this record

legal_basis.description: Multi-source legal basis. Primary: OSHA-KR Article 44 (PSM — operating procedures). Adjacent laws may include: OSHA-KR Article 13 (worker safety and health rules), SAPA Article 4 (establishment of safety work procedures).
